title: Device Home Screen - No Device Connected - Internet is off - Supported List
scenario: Tapping "Supported Devices" link on home screen shows "Feature unavailable" dialog when no device connected and internet is off
steps: 1. Launch the Poly Studio Mobile app on your Android device.
2. Ensure no Bluetooth audio device is connected to the phone.
3. Turn off internet connectivity (Wi-Fi and mobile data) on the phone.
4. Observe the Home screen — it should display the no-device state.
5. Tap the 'Supported Devices' link on the Home screen.
7. Tap the 'Ok got it' button on the dialog.
expected: A dialog appears with the message: 'Feature unavailable. An internet connection is required to access this feature.' and an 'Ok got it' button. Tapping the button dismisses the dialog and returns to the no-device Home screen.
